posts.text:
📝 TradeTech President Treva Klingbiel noted that this confirms a developing trend in the term #Uranium market.📈💲📜✍️⚛️⛽️
“Market participants have accepted that volatility may be a characteristic of the spot uranium market for some time, especially as geopolitical tensions remain unresolved. Combined with the steady stream of announcements reinforcing commitments on the demand side, utilities are seeking to limit their exposure to volatility in the spot uranium market and introduce more certainty into their budgets”💰🛒🤠🐂
